dialogue_text: —did you ever see such a thing as a drawing of a muchness?
source_excerpt: The Dormouse had closed its eyes by this time, and was going off into a doze; but, on being pinched by the Hatter, it woke up again with a little shriek, and went on: "—that begins with an M, such as mouse-traps, and the moon, and memory...
